text_original: short replies and not exciting or interesting chats
text_zh: 回复简短，且聊天内容枯燥乏味。
reply_original:
Hi there, I am truly sorry for the unpleasant experience. To help us improve, could you please share a screenshot of the chat with support@fantachat.ai? 

We recently launched a brand-new Memory Service and are optimizing our models to make replies more engaging. Your feedback is vital for our dev team to fix this. We will do better!
reply_zh:
你好，对于这次不愉快体验我深表歉意。为了帮助我们改进，能否请你将聊天截图发送至 support@fantachat.ai？

我们最近推出了全新的记忆服务，并正在优化模型以使回复更具吸引力。你的反馈对我们开发团队修复此问题至关重要。我们会做得更好！
